home.sub_welcome: Three small tasks today. No rush, no perfect.
home.sub_storm: Heavy day — you've already used SOS twice. Be gentle with yourself.
home.sub_steady: You reached out once. The next hours get easier from here.
home.sub_calm_clarity: The fog is lifting. Cravings are background noise now.
home.sub_calm_integration: New defaults are forming. The reach is dimming.
home.sub_calm_identity: You don't decide each time. The choice is who you are.
home.sub_calm_freedom: The habit is automatic. You walk past without noticing.
home.sub_light_morning: Easy morning. Watch out for a craving around {{peak}}.
home.sub_light_default: A quiet start. Check in tonight so we can read the day.
home.forecast_calm_hint: Low risk. Cortisol stable. Good for deep work.
home.insight_identity_body: You no longer ask "should I." You just don't. 6 min read.
home.freeze_subtitle: Miss a day? A Freeze saves your streak.

sos.coach_disclaimer: A companion, not a medical advisor.
sos.greeting_1: I feel you reached out. That matters already.
sos.greeting_2: What's in your hand right now — or in your mind?
sos.free_limit_headline: You've used all {{limit}} SOS sessions this month
sos.free_limit_body: Sugar Quit Premium gives you unlimited conversations — for the moments that matter most.
sos.followup_1: This is textbook cortisol dip plus post-meeting release. Not weakness.
sos.followup_2: Before the sugar — would you try one of these for two minutes?
sos.suggestion_walk: Stand up and walk for three minutes
sos.suggestion_water: A glass of water with lemon
sos.user_msg_stress_at_work: Stress at work. Want sweet now.

curriculum.identity_phase: Identity phase. You don't decide each time anymore. The choice has become who you are.
curriculum.phase_arrival_hero_body: You showed up. Day one or three, the only act that matters is that you started.
curriculum.phase_detox_hero_body: Cravings peak now. This is the hardest week — and it ends.
curriculum.phase_clarity_hero_body: Taste buds reset. Energy steadies. The quiet is starting to feel normal.
curriculum.phase_integration_hero_body: Your reflexes are rewiring. Sugar slips out of the auto-reach.
curriculum.phase_identity_hero_body: You don't decide each time anymore. The choice has become who you are.
curriculum.phase_freedom_hero_body: The habit is automatic. You walk past the candy aisle without noticing.
curriculum.lesson_day_8: Your taste buds are waking up

progress.identity_sub: You don't decide each time anymore. The choice has become who you are.
progress.identity_over_effort_sub: Choices stop costing willpower — they cost nothing.
progress.health_hint: What's happening in your body, not just your mind.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: NAME
profile.stats_hint_muted: Based on the average 25g a day people add to coffee, snacks, and drinks.

milestone.title: A MILESTONE
milestone.stones_path: You placed a large stone today. Each day adds another to the path.

welcome.title: Meet the quiet coach for your cravings
welcome.sub: Three minutes, and you'll have a 90-day plan for your body, your triggers, and the moment your hand reaches for sugar.

quiz_goal.hero: What's the shape of your goal?
quiz_goal.sub: Choose what fits. You can change this later.
quiz_goal.opt_quit_body: Zero added sugar, for my reasons.
quiz_goal.opt_reduce_body: Less sugar, more often, better mood.

quiz_motivation.sub: Pick any that feel true. Choose more than one.
quiz_motivation.opt_charge: I just want to feel in charge

quiz_sugar_goal.hero: How do you want to move?
quiz_sugar_goal.sub: Both work. There's no wrong answer.
quiz_sugar_goal.opt_quit_body: No added sugar from day one. I want the reset.
quiz_sugar_goal.opt_reduce_body: Step it down week by week. Build the habit.

quiz_peak.sub: The window we'll watch for you.
quiz_peak.time_hint: We'll watch the hour around this

quiz_triggers.hero: What tends to set it off?

quiz_consumption.hero: How much sugar runs through your week?
quiz_consumption.sub: Be honest. Only you see this.

quiz_past.hero: Have you tried to quit before?
quiz_past.opt_first_title: This is my first real try

quiz_work.hero: Where do you spend your days?
quiz_work.sub: Context shapes the cravings we'll watch for.

quiz_name.sub: Optional. We'll keep it soft and personal.
quiz_name.a11y_hint: Optional. Press Done or Continue to proceed.
